task:
OBJECTIVE: Rewrite /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Main KOMMIT page. Replace the default Next.js template entirely.

Add "use client" at top.

Imports: import { useState } from "react";

State:
- input: string
- status: "idle" | "processing" | "done" | "crisis"
- agentEvents: Array<{ agent: string; detail: string }>
- card: { truth: string; commitment: string; stake: string; clarity: string; challenge: string } | null
- crisisResources: { primary: { name: string; number: string; url: string } } | null

handleSubmit():
1. Set status "processing", clear events and card.
2. const res = await fetch("/api/analyze", { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ text: input }) })
3. const reader = res.body!.getReader(); const decoder = new TextDecoder();
4. Loop: read chunks, decode, split on "data: ", filter empty, JSON.parse each.
5. If event.agent: push { agent: event.agent, detail: JSON.stringify(event).slice(0, 80) } to agentEvents.
6. If event.type === "result": set card from event.card.
7. If event.type === "crisis": set crisisResources, status "crisis".
8. If event.type === "done": set status "done".

Render (inline styles only, no Tailwind, background #FAFAF8, accent #3D5A36):
- Header: "KOMMIT" bold large, tagline "Your word, backed."
- Textarea: value={input} onChange, placeholder="What is weighing on you?", 4 rows
- Button "Find the truth" onClick={handleSubmit} disabled when status==="processing"
- When processing: show agentEvents as a list. Each shows agent name + detail.
- When status==="crisis": show crisisResources.primary.name, number, url. Message: "You are not alone."
- When card exists: three blocks — "What is happening" (card.clarity), "What you are avoiding" (card.challenge), "The truth" (card.truth). Then card.commitment. Then button "Back this with $5" that navigates to /commit?truth=+encodeURIComponent(card.truth)+"&commitment="+encodeURIComponent(card.commitment)+"&stakeAmount=500"

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
"use client" at top
handleSubmit reads SSE stream
Card renders three sections
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: use Tailwind
DO NOT: import from any lib file directly
DO NOT: use ast.parse
